assertions.description: ToggleEvent exposes a read-only source attribute on its prototype.
ToggleEventInit.source defaults to null when no source element is supplied.
Opening a popover from a popovertarget button fires beforetoggle with source set to that button.
Opening a popover from a popovertarget button queues a toggle event whose source is the invoking button.
Programmatic showPopover() fires beforetoggle and toggle with source set to null when no source option is supplied.
assertions.test: (()=>new Promise(resolve=>{const p=document.createElement('div');let beforeOk=false;let done=false;const finish=ok=>{if(done)return;done=true;try{if(p.matches(':popover-open'))p.hidePopover();}catch(_){}p.remove();resolve(ok);};p.setAttribute('popover','manual');document.body.append(p);p.addEventListener('beforetoggle',ev=>{beforeOk=ev instanceof ToggleEvent&&ev.source===null&&ev.oldState==='closed'&&ev.newState==='open';},{once:true});p.addEventListener('toggle',ev=>finish(beforeOk&&ev instanceof ToggleEvent&&ev.source===null&&ev.oldState==='closed'&&ev.newState==='open'),{once:true});try{p.showPopover();}catch(e){finish(false);}setTimeout(()=>finish(false),500);}))()

assertions.description: Hiding an open popover via the same popovertarget button reports that button as the source on beforetoggle and toggle.
assertions.test: (()=>new Promise(resolve=>{const id='cps-hide-'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);const b=document.createElement('button');const p=document.createElement('div');let opened=false;let beforeCloseOk=false;let done=false;const finish=ok=>{if(done)return;done=true;try{if(p.matches(':popover-open'))p.hidePopover();}catch(_){}b.remove();p.remove();resolve(ok);};b.setAttribute('popovertarget',id);p.id=id;p.setAttribute('popover','manual');document.body.append(b,p);p.addEventListener('beforetoggle',ev=>{if(opened)beforeCloseOk=ev instanceof ToggleEvent&&ev.source===b&&ev.oldState==='open'&&ev.newState==='closed';});p.addEventListener('toggle',ev=>{if(!opened&&ev.newState==='open'){opened=true;setTimeout(()=>{try{b.click();}catch(e){finish(false);}},0);return;}if(opened&&ev.newState==='closed')finish(beforeCloseOk&&ev instanceof ToggleEvent&&ev.source===b&&ev.oldState==='open'&&ev.newState==='closed');});try{b.click();}catch(e){finish(false);}setTimeout(()=>finish(false),800);}))()
